summary: Test suite covers core functionality (parsing, aggregation, flaky detection, markdown generation) but has significant gaps. Missing: CLI/main() entry point testing, error scenario coverage (malformed XML/JSON, invalid statuses, missing keys), edge cases (empty suites, zero durations, etc.), and workflow validation. Tests are happy-path focused with external fixture dependencies. Good organization and naming, but could improve with pytest fixtures/parametrization instead of helper methods. Would catch basic regressions in core logic but lacks rigor for error handling and boundary conditions required by task specification.
